summary: Comprehensive testing of JT-Zero robotics runtime dashboard. All backend APIs (11 endpoints) pass 100%, all frontend panels visible and functional. Minor recharts console warnings during initial render but no functional impact.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer shows brief 'width(-1) height(-1)' warnings during initial render before data loads. This is cosmetic and does not affect chart functionality. Fix applied with minWidth={1} minHeight={1} but warnings still appear briefly during hydration.

passed_tests: GET /api/health returns status=ok, mode=native, native=true, build_info with compiler (GCC 12.2), cpp_standard (201703), platform (aarch64)
GET /api/state returns complete drone state with roll/pitch/yaw/altitude_agl and all sensors (imu, baro, gps, rangefinder, optical_flow)
GET /api/telemetry returns state + threads array (8 threads) + engines object (events, reflexes, rules, memory)
GET /api/events returns event array with timestamp, type, priority, message fields
GET /api/camera returns fps_actual (~15 FPS), frame_count, width/height (320x240), vo_features_detected/tracked, vo_tracking_quality
GET /api/mavlink returns state=CONNECTED, messages_sent/received counters, fc_autopilot=ArduPilot, fc_firmware=AP 4.5.0, fc_type=QUADROTOR
GET /api/performance returns total_cpu_percent (<5%), threads array with CPU per thread, memory stats (total_mb ~0.65MB), latency/throughput metrics
GET /api/simulator/config returns wind_speed, wind_direction, sensor_noise, battery_drain, gravity, mass_kg, drag_coeff, turbulence
POST /api/simulator/config successfully updates config values (tested wind_speed update)
POST /api/command ARM/DISARM/TAKEOFF/LAND all return success=true with proper command confirmation
WebSocket /api/ws/telemetry streams real-time data (verified via frontend)
Frontend loads without JavaScript errors
3D View panel (data-testid=drone-3d-panel) renders with Three.js drone model, motor indicators, altitude overlay
Drone Telemetry panel (data-testid=drone-panel) shows attitude indicator, roll/pitch/yaw/altitude values, heading compass, altitude chart
Simulator panel (data-testid=simulator-panel) with wind, sensor noise, battery, physics sliders and Reset button
Event Log panel (data-testid=event-log) displays 200+ events with proper filtering and color coding
Commands panel (data-testid=command-panel) with all 7 buttons (ARM, DISARM, TAKEOFF, LAND, HOLD, RTL, E-STOP) clickable and functional
Performance panel (data-testid=performance-panel) shows runtime mode badge 'C++ NATIVE', CPU bars for 7 threads, memory stats
Sensor panels (data-testid=sensor-panels) with IMU, Barometer, GPS, Rangefinder/Flow sub-panels
Camera/VO panel displays feature map, FPS, frames, resolution, VO quality
MAVLink panel shows CONNECTED status, system IDs, link quality (95%), message counters
Simulator Reset button (data-testid=sim-reset-btn) clickable and functional
Runtime info panel (data-testid=runtime-info) shows MODE, THREADS, MAVLINK, BIND status
Header shows JT-Zero v1.0, C++ Native badge, flight mode (IDLE), LINK status, heartbeat, CPU temp, uptime, battery
critical_code_review_comments: All 41 pytest backend tests pass - comprehensive API coverage
All data-testid attributes present for testability
Native C++ runtime operational with excellent performance metrics (CPU <5%, Memory <1MB, zero dropped events)
seed_data_creation: N/A - Uses C++ native runtime simulated sensor data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints tested and working. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_jtzero_api.py covers all REST endpoints. The recharts warnings are cosmetic only - charts render correctly once data loads. Native C++ runtime (jtzero_native.so) fully operational with pybind11 bindings. WebSocket streams at 10Hz with full telemetry payload.
